title: August 29
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}
'''August 29''' is the 241st day of the year (242nd in leap years), with 124 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1950s#1954|1954]] – [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]] is born.
*[[1973]] – [[Jason Spisak]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Dante Basco]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 79|''Star Wars Weekly'' 79]] published.
*[[1997]] – [[Netflix, Inc.]] is founded.
*[[2000]] – [[Shelagh Fraser]] dies.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace (PhotoComic)|''Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace'' PhotoComic]] published.
*[[2012]] – [[Darth Maul—Death Sentence 2|''Darth Maul—Death Sentence'' 2]] published.
*2012 – [[Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison 4|''Darth Vader and the Ghost Prison'' 4]] published.
*[[2016]] – "[[Return of the Kyber Saber]]" premieres on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Complete Season Three]]'' released.
*[[2018]] – [[Lando - Double or Nothing 4|''Lando - Double or Nothing'' 4]] published.
*2018 – [[Poe Dameron Annual 2|''Poe Dameron Annual'' 2]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures (2017) 13|''Star Wars Adventures'' (2017) 13]] published.
*2018 – ''[[The Star Wars Trilogy]]'' reprinted as part of the [[Barnes & Noble Collectible Editions]] series.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge|''Star Wars'': Galaxy's Edge]] opens in Walt Disney World in Orlando, Florida.
*[[2021]] – [[Ed Asner]] dies.
*[[2023]] – "[[Part Three: Time to Fly]]" airs on Disney+.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Omnibus Vol. 2]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures — The Complete Phase I]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[From a Certain Point of View: Return of the Jedi]]'' published.
*2023 – [[From a Certain Point of View: Return of the Jedi (audiobook)|''From a Certain Point of View: Return of the Jedi'' audiobook]] released.
*2023 – [[Jamie Christopher]] dies.
<noinclude>
